email_subject: Application for Customer Service Representative (Turkish/Bulgarian) - Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Service Representative position at Unique Antwerpen. With fluency in Turkish, Bulgarian, and English, and experience in customer-facing roles, I am confident I can contribute to your team in the transport and logistics sector.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client communication and ensure accurate case handling, which has strengthened my ability to stay calm under pressure and focus on solutions. My background in logistics at Katoen Natie has given me firsthand experience in a fast-paced, high-volume environment where accuracy and efficiency are key.

I am proactive, structured, and enjoy supporting clients to ensure smooth operations. I am eager to bring my language skills and customer service mindset to your international team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can add value to your company.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Customer Service Representative position at Unique Antwerpen. With fluency in Turkish, Bulgarian, and English, and a strong customer service mindset, I am eager to contribute to your team in the transport and logistics sector.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client websites and ensure clear communication and accurate handling of requests. This has honed my ability to stay calm under pressure and focus on solutions—skills directly relevant to supporting international clients. Additionally, my experience in warehouse and logistics at Katoen Natie taught me the importance of accuracy and efficiency in a fast-paced environment, which aligns with the demands of this role.

I am proactive, structured, and enjoy taking ownership of tasks. I am comfortable working independently and thrive in international settings. My language skills in Turkish, Bulgarian, and English allow me to communicate effectively with diverse clients, ensuring smooth operations across Europe.

I am particularly drawn to this opportunity because it combines my customer service strengths with an international logistics environment. I am confident that my ability to maintain overview, handle inquiries, and improve processes will make me a valuable asset to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can contribute to Unique Antwerpen.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Fluent in Turkish, Bulgarian, and English, enabling clear communication with international clients
Experience in customer-facing roles, ensuring accurate case handling and client satisfaction
Background in logistics at Katoen Natie, maintaining accuracy and efficiency in a fast-paced environment
Proactive and structured, with a focus on solutions and process improvement
Comfortable working independently and staying calm under pressure
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Customer Service Representative
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with a customer service mindset and fluency in Turkish, Bulgarian, and English. Experienced in client-facing roles, ensuring clear communication and accurate case handling. Background in logistics at Katoen Natie, where I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume environment. Proactive, structured, and calm under pressure, with a focus on solutions and process improvement. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English, Turkish, and Bulgarian; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Languages: Turkish (native), Bulgarian (fluent), English (professional), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- Customer service: client communication, case handling, invoice support, process improvement
- Logistics: accuracy, efficiency, high-volume environment
- Digital tools: Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, CRM systems (quick learner)
- Other: proactive, structured, calm under pressure, independent work

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage client communication and ensure accurate handling of requests, maintaining clear and professional correspondence
- Support invoice and payment-related inquiries by coordinating with clients and internal teams
- Track and report on performance metrics, ensuring all administration is correct and up to date
- Proactively suggest improvements to processes and workflows to enhance efficiency

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Ensured smooth operations by following procedures and keeping overview

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site, managing all client communication and ensuring timely delivery
- Implemented structured data and technical optimizations to improve visibility

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
